integrity.description: The agent interacted with the VeraCrypt GUI to create and mount the volumes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the VeraCrypt application windows, Volume Creation Wizard, and password prompts being actively used, rather than purely terminal-based 'veracrypt' CLI commands.

integrity.description: The agent copied the actual source files rather than fabricating empty files with the same names.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a copy-paste operation in a file manager from '/home/ga/Documents/sensitive_files/' or a 'cp' command in the terminal referencing the source directory.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a pre-written script to automate the entire process.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of the agent writing and executing a bash or python script that runs all the mounting, creation, and copying steps at once.
